song_name: How Am I Supposed To Live Without You

versions.song_name: How Am I Supposed To Live Without You
How Am I Supposed To Live Without You

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: How Am I Supposed To Live Without You

recommended.song_name: The Man Who Cant Be Moved

content:
[Intro]

[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]  


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I could hardly believe it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
when I heard the news today[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Am/F#[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
I had to come and get it straight from you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
They said you were leaving,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
someone swept your heart away.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
From that look on your face I say it's true.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                                 [ch]C[/ch]           
So tell me all about it, tell me about the plans you're making.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
Tell me one thing more before I go:[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]    
Tell me how am I supposed to live without you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] 
Now that I've been loving you so long.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
How am I supposed to live without you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
and how am I supposed to carry on,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
when all that I've been living for is gone.[/tab]


[Verse 2] 

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]Bm[/ch]
Too tired for crying, didn't come here to break down.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                             [ch]D[/ch]
It's just a dream of mine that's coming to an end.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]Bm[/ch]                   
And how can I play now, when I build my world around[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                                [ch]D[/ch]
the hope that one day we'd be so much more than friends.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                                 [ch]C[/ch]
I don't wanna know the price I'm gonna pay for dreaming.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
Even now it's more than I can take[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]    
Tell me how am I supposed to live without you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] 
Now that I've been loving you so long.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
How am I supposed to live without you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
and how am I supposed to carry on,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
when all that I've been living for is gone.[/tab]
               
Now I don't wanna know the price I'm gonna pay for dreaming,
now that your dream has come true.


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]    
Tell me how am I supposed to live without you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] 
Now that I've been loving you so long.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
How am I supposed to live without you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
and how am I supposed to carry on,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
when all that I've been living for is gone.[/tab]
